title: Dacun Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Dacun with a Z-Score of +3.66. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Dacun is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.8 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 63%, and the wind speed is 3.2 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The lack of cooling, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, is exacerbating the situation, leading to a critical level of heat stress.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
